description: CompositionNavy blue T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has a round neck, short sleeves, DD logo on the left chest and ADIDAS branding on right chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry, dry clean or iron on print/trims/ logoDry in shadeWarm ironCrank up your style as the cricket craze kicks off this summer with this Delhi Daredevils Fan T-shirt from ADIDAS. You'll be displaying Delhi pride with this tee as you cheer your team at the IPL. There's no better way of saying 'Go Daredevils!' than with this T-shirt!
